visual_description: A hand wrapped in blood-stained white bandages grips a dark object, fingers curled tightly. A close-up of a man’s face shows his eyes and nose, with wetness visible on his skin and hair partially obscuring his features. The scene is dimly lit with a dark, indistinct background.
audio_description: The audio features a female voice with a high pitch and moderate loudness, speaking at a moderate pace with a clear and steady prosody.
